title: CustomShellHost.exe
html:
CustomShellHost.exe

A host process that is used by custom shells when using Windows in Kiosk mode.

Execute

Can be used to evade defensive counter-measures

CustomShellHost.exe

Executes explorer.exe (with command-line argument /NoShellRegistrationCheck) if present in the current working folder. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: User
